overall.description: A first-person perspective moving slowly upstream along a shallow river or stream in a lush green valley. The camera passes a stone retaining wall and approaches a small waterfall structure with a wooden building visible on the hillside. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine with cinematic lighting and detailed natural environments.

segments.scene_description: Moving slowly upstream through a shallow stream flanked by a stone retaining wall on the right and a rocky slope on the left. The water is clear and the surrounding vegetation is lush and green under a partly cloudy sky, with a small waterfall visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream approach to small waterfall with rural building

events.description: stone retaining wall exits view as stream opens up into wider section
wooden house becomes visible on left hillside through the trees

agents.ego_description: continuing upstream toward the small waterfall structure, water depth remaining shallow

entered.detail: small rural building with sloped roof partially visible through trees on hillside
concrete or stone dam structure creating a small waterfall

segments.scene_description: The stone wall falls away as the stream continues toward the waterfall. A wooden house appears on the left hillside, partially obscured by foliage. The camera steadily approaches the waterfall structure where water flows over a small weir.

events.description: passing over the waterfall edge where water becomes turbulent and white
entering calmer water pool section above the waterfall

agents.ego_description: passing over the waterfall and continuing into the upper stream section

entered.detail: large rocks in the stream creating small rapids above the waterfall
calmer water section above the dam with visible rocky bed

segments.scene_description: Passing over the small waterfall where the water becomes turbulent and white. The camera moves into the upper section of the stream where the water is calmer with visible rocky boulders, while the wooden building remains visible on the left bank surrounded by dense forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement upstream through a lush valley, transitioning from a structured stream bed to a wilder, forested waterway. It begins by gliding through clear, shallow water flanked by a stone retaining wall and a rocky slope under a partly cloudy sky. As the stone wall falls away, the camera steadily approaches a distant waterfall while a wooden house emerges from the foliage on the left hillside. The scene then shifts as the camera passes over a small weir, where the water turns turbulent and white before smoothing out into a calmer upper stream. Finally, the movement continues past large rocky boulders with the wooden building remaining visible on the left bank, nestled within a dense forest.
